item.title: Smokey liner in one swipe
item.description: Try this simple eye makeup tip for a lifted, polished look. A tiny change can help define the eyes and complete your makeup.

item.title: Perfect Smokey Wing in a Few Steps
item.description: Learn how to create a perfect smokey wing in a few simple steps. This makeup tutorial shares an easy way to achieve a soft, defined eye look.

item.title: Simple Smokey Cat Eye Lift Tutorial
item.description: Learn how to create a simple smokey cat eye with a lifted finish. The blend is easy, and the lift is the part you’ll want to copy.

item.title: Leave a small gap for a sharper wing
